posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi, I need speech feature that can play when the item is created, so we can avoid to keep our eyes on monitor to know the item created. Will be cool if in the recipe let me select speech the Name or specific columns.

What are you trying to achieve

Speech the item name or specific column content.
